final:
module T_latch (
    input wire T,
    input wire clk,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (T) begin
            Q <= ~Q; // Toggle the output
        end
        // If T is low, Q holds its value
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (T) begin
        Q <= T;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
